exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.suggestion_note: Last session 2026-04-17 52.5kg × 9 reps; start conservative at MEV week 1, RPE 7 (3 reps in reserve)

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.suggestion_note: Last session 2026-04-17 100kg × 8 reps; hold weight, control eccentric 3-1-2 tempo

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.suggestion_note: Last session 2026-03-05 52.5kg × 9 reps; neutral grip to respect rotator cuff, drive from hamstrings/glutes

exercises.name: Seated Leg Curl
exercises.suggestion_note: Last session 2026-04-17 50kg × 14 reps; reduce reps slightly for controlled tempo, maintain hamstring MEV

exercises.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
exercises.suggestion_note: Last session 2026-03-05 55kg × 8 reps; glutes at optimal volume but include for hypertrophy momentum, squeeze peak contraction 1-2 sec

exercises.name: Hanging Knee Raise
exercises.suggestion_note: Last session 2026-04-13 28 reps BW; aim 12–15 reps with control, 2-1-2 tempo; abs MEV = 8 total for week (4 this session + 4 Friday)

notes: Leg day accumulation week 1 — all muscles at MEV. Back squat conservative to allow quality reps after Hyrox taper (ACWR 0.0). 3-1-2 tempo (eccentric-pause-concentric) on all working sets, RPE 6–7 (3–4 reps from failure). Total leg volume this session: quads 3+3=6, hamstrings 2+2=4, glutes 2, lower_back 0 (RDL secondary), abs 2 of 8 target. Nutrition: 2800 kcal / 155g protein (surplus +150 kcal) to support muscle protein synthesis during recomp.
